---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: shandar
---

## What problem does this solve?

What use case is currently painful or impossible?

## Proposed solution

How should this work? Be specific.

## Alternatives considered

What else have you tried, or what other approaches could work?

## Which skill would this affect?

- [ ] memory-map (snapshot)
- [ ] memory-recall (load)
- [ ] memory-prune (clean)
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Cross-cutting / plugin level
